{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Thought-conduction alloy
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Thought-conduction alloy]] is contained within the [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Thought-conduction alloy]] is a valuable material that [[Horizon]] can fabricate.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
